subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou dost witness how I have been tried in Thy dominion, and from whence, O my God, hatred hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی تشهد کیف ابتلیت فی مملکتک و من جهه یا الهی بدت الغل و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
